task_completion.description: Create a 'MainFuselage' component centered at the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Geometry Browser shows a Pod/Fuselage component named 'MainFuselage'. In the 3D view, it is centered at the origin.

task_completion.description: Create a 'LeftBoom' component offset to the left with XZ symmetry disabled.

task_completion.description: Create a 'MainWing' component with XZ symmetry disabled, 1 section on the right, and 2 sections on the left.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Geometry Browser shows a Wing component named 'MainWing'. The 3D view or Wing geometry dialog shows an asymmetric wing connecting the fuselages, with 1 section on the right side and 2 sections on the left side.
OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/asymmetric_concept.vsp3, or a terminal/file manager showing this file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using OpenVSP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The programmatic verifier for this task is missing from the environment, making visual verification of the OpenVSP model the sole method of scoring.
